markdown:
#  Edit a Submittal Package 
##  Background 
A _submittal package_ is a container that stores one or more _submittals_. Typically, a _general contractor_ creates submittal packages that list all of the individual submittals specific to a particular trade or _subcontractor_. For example, one might create a submittal package to contain all of the plumbing-related submittals in a commercial building project.
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permission** :
    * 'Admin' level permissions on the project's Submittals tool.


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Submittals** tool.
  2. Click **Packages**.
  3. Locate the submittal package that you want to edit and click **Edit**.
  4. Make changes as needed.
  5. In the 'Submittals in this Package' list, you have these options:
     * Click the 'X' next to a submittal to remove it from the package.
     * Click **Create Submittal** to create a new submittal in the package.
     * Click **Add Existing Submittal** to add a submittal that already exists to the package.
  6. Click **Update Package**.


## See Also
  * [Best Practices: Submittal Packages - Creation and Review](https://v2.support.procore.com/reference-best-practices-submittal-packages-creation-and-review)
  * [Best Practices: Submittal Builder](https://v2.support.procore.com/reference-best-practices-submittal-builder)
  * [Who receives an email when a submittal is created or updated?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-who-receives-an-email-when-a-submittal-is-created-or-updated)
title: Edit a Submittal Package
description: How to edit a submittal package using the Project level Submittals tool.
